[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 1101010 4
7 1111011 6

67 76 0000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
70 07 0011000 2
